explanation: The user wants to place an apple into the fridge. Since no object is currently being held, I first pick up the apple using the identifier apple_0 (as it is a new object and no suffix is used in discussed_objects). Then, I navigate to the fridge using Go_to(fridge_0), and finally place the apple inside the fridge using Place(apple_0, fridge_0). This sequence ensures the apple is properly stored in the fridge as requested.
